transcript.text:
She would probably order 3 servings of each
[Then let's double that]
[Today's menu]
[Smoked BBQ]
[Briquette Grill]
[Can you eat all of that?]
Don't think she will eat that much
She eats 17 servings
[No way]
[I can eat a good amount too]
[Cleared]
Hello everyone
I'm near Amsa Station today
It's my first time here
There's a highly rated restaurant here that is affordable
Also has a lot of regulars So I'm here to check it out

[Gochujang Gui] [Seoul, Gangdong-gu]
They're known for their Gochujang grill (Red chili paste)
That and also gochujang pork belly which I love
[And other various dishes]
Hello hello
Hello
Are you a customer...? Oh, sorry
I've been waiting for you
[How did you know?]
I had no idea until the owner told me you're coming
[I told everyone]
[Thank you]
-You were on TV, right? -Yes, correct
That's how she knows you
She's a good eater
She opens her mouth like this

The gochujang grill is delicious
Mackerel is good too
Looks delicious
Will you eat 10 servings? You can do that
It can't be that much
10 servings
She can eat 17 servings too
[I don't believe you]
[She can do it vs she can't do it]
Not even Kang Hodong can eat that much (Ex-Korean traditional wrestler)
[Don't fight]
She might order 3 servings of everything
You sound silly right now
Maybe she orders 1 serving to take 1 bite
And say that she ate everything
Right?!

[He won't believe it until he sees it]
How can 10+ servings fit in that small body of yours
Not even possible for Kang Hodong
[Just wait until she orders]
Does 1 grill include 1 serving?
No, 2 servings
Should I order 16 servings?
16 servings?
Here we go again... Just be quiet
[There's no way]
6 servings of Gochujang grill
What do I do? I want everything
This one's good too
Squid grill
6 servings of gochujang grill,
6 servings of soy sauce marinated grill,

2 servings of gochujang pork belly,
1 squid grill, and 1 soybean stew, please
I don't understand...
[They're leaving now]
[Going on a rant about how she's not human]
I will bet 10,000 Won that you can't finish it
[Will he win that bet?]
[Gochujang Pork Belly]
[Gochujang Grill]
[Soy Sauce Marinated Grill]
[The meal's ready]
[Coming in non-stop]
We have the meat grills out, but not the side dishes yet
Let's have a taste
Gochujang grill,
Soy sauce,

And gochujang pork belly
The portions are big
The reviews said that this place is very cost-efficient
That smoked flavor
This needs to be eaten with rice It's going to be great
This has a crispy side
And also a soft side
The smokiness is great
It's a real briquette grill
The sauce is tasty
Some pork belly before it gets cold
Grab it
That meat to fat ratio
Amazing
It's tasty
Thank you

It looks great
What's this?
Buchimgae (Korean pancake) on the house
It's all here
They give you big portions
I love the scent
I want to try the soy sauce ones
How do you like it?
It's so good!
This has some chewiness
I love the crispy outside
This dish needs to be eaten with rice
This just looks good already
This is it
A spicy and refreshing soybean stew
-Are you liking the stew? -Yes, it's delicious

Very good
Some rice
A piece of tofu
They said the squid grill is good too
Looks very tender
Smoked flavor
I love it
She gave me this on the house
This is how you eat it
With grilled squid
Put it on top like this
[Gochujang grill]
Soy sauce marinated too
Both are phenomenal
Let's try some kimchi
[1st gear]

[2nd]
[3rd]
Delicious
Tastes great together
I'm loving the gochujang pork belly
This is a lot of food
[The grills have 3 servings except for the pork belly]
It's hard to find briquette grill places these days
The smoky flavor is everything
It's not spicy, but it builds up
This is going to be crispy
That's like deep-fried
Seasoned perfectly
Not salty
Soju will go well with this
Only if I didn't drive here

Excuse me
1 more bowl of rice, please
Thank you
I feel like the soy sauce marinated grill will go well with squid
Together
These taste so good
The sauce is nice and sweet
On top
It tastes so good going back and forth I'm not getting sick of the same taste
It's spicy It stacks up
[Refill on the stew] Thank you
[Boiling soybean stew]
Delicious
It's spicy, but I can't stop
A meat explosion wrap
This is too big

The soup
All soybean stews are good
[Hand-brisket soybean stew from April 3, 2022]
It has a bit of a crab flavor
Homemade kimchi
This
Gochujang
I save the best for last
And I saved these for last
Can I have 1 more rice, please
We just made it so it's hot
That's hot!
Squid grill
Quick reactions
The meat is very tender
A lot of people like half meat & half fat

But for me, there needs to be a lot of fat
1 scoop of rice
It's starting to get spicy again
Gochujang pork belly is good too, but
Soy sauce marinated pork belly would be great too
I will be waiting for them to get that on the menu
Did you enjoy your meal?
It was so good
Just the 2 grills alone were 12 servings
You're a good eater
I really love the squid too
It's not getting smaller
[The beverages shock me more]
1 last bite
[Finished]
[Finishing up the stew]

Thanks everyone~
